---
ID: US-CMP-FE-111
Title: Campaign list and detail screens
Status: Not Started
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-111
Epic: CMP-E1: Campaign Management and Cadence
---

As a user
I want campaign list and detail views with lifecycle counts so I can understand campaign progress quickly.
So campaign work does not require manual reconciliation.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Campaign list shows name, date range, status, state counts, and next open slot.
- [ ] Campaign detail shows strategy fields, keyword tags, and grouped content status sections.
- [ ] Campaign detail surfaces upcoming claimed posts and recent posted items.
- [ ] Campaign detail shows activity feed for permitted roles.
- [ ] Empty/loading/error states are explicit and recoverable.
